mapper.select: SELECT BRDCST_CD, BRDCST_NM, CNTRCT_FEE, WIN_BONUS, POST_BONUS, KS_BONUS FROM BRDCST_SPNSR ORDER BY CNTRCT_FEE DESC
SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'BRDCST_SPNSR' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GAME_CFG (CFG_KEY, CFG_VAL, UPD_DT) VALUES ('BRDCST_SPNSR', #{brdcstCd}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CFG_VAL = #{brdcstCd}, UPD_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'USER_TM_ID' LIMIT 1
SELECT SSNT_YR FROM SSNT ORDER BY SSNT_YR DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CUR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM SSNT ORDER BY SSNT_YR DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, EVNT_TYPE_CD, TM_ID, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS, RD_YN) VALUES (#{evnt.ssntYr}, #{evnt.evntDt}, #{evnt.evntTypeCd}, #{evnt.tmId}, #{evnt.ttlt}, #{evnt.cnts}, '0')
INSERT INTO TM_BRDCST (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, BRDCST_CD, REG_DT) VALUES (#{tmId}, #{ssntYr}, #{brdcstCd}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE BRDCST_CD = VALUES(BRDCST_CD)
